Description: Verify the browser/document title of the home page matches the design
The <h1> on the home page must exactly match the design copy
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/ 2. Assert text of h1 element

Test Case/Summary: Home — body paragraph text matches design
Description: The descriptive paragraph must exactly match the design copy
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to https://example.com/ 2. Assert text of first

element
Expected outcome: p text = 'This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations.'

Test Case/Summary: Home — 'Learn more' link is present and visible
Description: The Learn more hyperlink must exist and be visible (confirmed text: 'Learn more'; href: https://iana.org/domains/example; same-tab)
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/ 2. Locate a:has-text('Learn more') 3. Assert visible
Expected outcome: Link with exact text 'Learn more' is present and visible

Description: Body background must be the light grey (#eeeeee) shown in the design
Design shows no <header>; any <header> in live DOM is a design defect
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/ 2. Count header elements

Description: Design shows no <nav>; any <nav> in live DOM is a design defect
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/ 2. Count nav elements

Description: Design shows no <footer>; any <footer> in live DOM is a design defect
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/ 2. Count footer elements

Description: Clicking the Learn more link must navigate (same tab) to the IANA example-domains page
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/ 2. Click a:has-text('Learn more') 3. Wait for networkidle 4. Assert h1

Description: The h1 on the IANA page must match the design copy
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Screen 2 via TC-009 2. Assert text of h1

Test Case/Summary: Screen 2 — top-nav has exactly 4 items in correct order
Description: Nav must contain Domains | Protocols | Numbers | About in that exact order
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Screen 2 2. Collect all nav a texts 3. Assert count=4 and order

Test Case/Summary: Screen 2 — RFC 2606 link present in body
Description: Body must contain a visible clickable RFC 2606 link as shown in design
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Screen 2 2. Locate a:has-text('RFC 2606') 3. Assert visible

Test Case/Summary: Screen 2 — RFC 6761 link present in body
Description: Body must contain a visible clickable RFC 6761 link as shown in design
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Screen 2 2. Locate a:has-text('RFC 6761') 3. Assert visible

Description: A section heading 'Further Reading' must appear as shown in the design
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Screen 2 2. Locate h2 3. Assert text = 'Further Reading'
Expected outcome: 'Further Reading' h2 visible; it is the only h2 on the page

Test Case/Summary: Screen 2 — 'IANA-managed Reserved Domains' bullet link present
Description: The bulleted link beneath Further Reading must be present as shown in design
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Screen 2 2. Locate a:has-text('IANA-managed Reserved Domains') 3. Assert visible
Expected outcome: Link visible and in a list item

Description: Revision date line must appear exactly as shown in design
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Screen 2 2. Locate text='Last revised 2017-05-13.' 3. Assert visible

Description: Footer must contain a Privacy Policy link as shown in design
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Screen 2 2. Locate a:has-text('Privacy Policy') 3. Assert visible

Test Case/Summary: Screen 2 — footer 'Terms of Service' link present
Description: Footer must contain a Terms of Service link as shown in design
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Screen 2 2. Locate a:has-text('Terms of Service') 3. Assert visible
Expected outcome: 'Terms of Service' link visible in footer
